MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-25-2023 Set For Trial On Jul-22-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-07-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS JODY MCCOWN, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Compel Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions

Motion to compel DENIED without prejudice. Plaintiff has agreed to appear on November 14, 2023. There does not yet appear to be grounds for an order compelling such an appearance. Nothing in this order impacts Plaintiff's responsibility for cancelation fees. The requests for sanctions by both sides are DENIED. The City's request is denied because the notice of unavailability and subsequent discussions indicate that further meet and confer may have avoided this motion. Plaintiff's request is denied because the opposition is late and therefore not procedurally proper. While I exercise my discretion to consider the opposition, I will not do so for the request for sanctions.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at sborrowman@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)

MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY
Off Calendar Jun-29-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances are made. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY

Motion granted. No opposition filed. Responding Party/Plaintiff shall serve code-complaint responses, without objections, to Defendants' discovery requests within seven (7) days of service of notice of entry of this order.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: William Trupek; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
